source.client_brief: NovaPay Financial is a mid-sized fintech (400 employees) running a monolithic Java payments app. We want a 6-month engagement to assess the architecture, design a microservices target on AWS, migrate the core payment module, and keep PCI-DSS compliance. Required: AWS, microservices, payments domain.
